title: Zambia drops out of top 50 global mining jurisdictions – Zambia: News Diggers!
impact_evidence: Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Employment creation and job security -> "If a country is perceived as a risky investment destination, international companies will not build mines, factories, or open branches of their businesses in that country." || Governance | Regulation, Compliance & Institutions | Legislative and regulatory framework effectiveness -> "Mining industry executives and managers are asked their opinion on 15 issues that contribute to investment attractiveness. These include uncertainty around existing regulations, uncertainty around environmental regulations, the legal system, the tax system, availability of skills and labour, labour regulations and political stability." | "...These were its taxation regime, the poor state of its geological database, and, rather worryingly, political instability." || Governance | Reputation & Social License | Mining image and public perception -> "Zambia's reduced position on the Index was a result of negative perceptions, which had been heightened in recent months due to growing political instability that had engulfed the country." | "Although the Index is not based on hard data – but rather the perceptions of mining company executives – these perceptions influence investment decisions." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Human capital development (skills, training, workforce development) -> "These include ... availability of skills and labour ..."
impact_level2: Livelihoods & Economy || Regulation, Compliance & Institutions || Reputation & Social License || Livelihoods & Economy
impact_level3: Employment creation and job security || Legislative and regulatory framework effectiveness || Mining image and public perception || Human capital development (skills, training, workforce development)

title: High Court refuses to restrain Dangote from quarrying on Masaiti farmland – Zambia: News Diggers!
impact_evidence: Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Land disturbance and land-use change -> "refuses to restrain Dangote from quarrying on Masaiti farmland" | "continuing to carry out mining works or developments on the farmland and villages belonging to over 200 people in senior Chief Chiwala's chiefdom of Masaiti District." || Social | Equity, Rights & Vulnerable Groups | Land ownership impacts and regional value changes -> "an order directing that Dangote Quarries' operations be shut down until adequate compensation has been paid in full to all plaintiffs, and damages for their loss of use of land." | "they further wanted the defendants to be restrained from interfering with their rights and ownership of their properties and assets until the determination of the matter or until further order." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation -> "seeking a declaration that Dangote Quarries has failed to address or mitigate the adverse social and economic impacts of their cement project on the plaintiffs."
impact_level2: Land, Soil & Geology || Equity, Rights & Vulnerable Groups || Livelihoods & Economy
impact_level3: Land disturbance and land-use change || Land ownership impacts and regional value changes || Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation

title: Please China, spare us from Coronavirus – Zambia: News Diggers!
impact_evidence: Social | Health, Safety & Well-being | Worker health and safety risks -> "At a Chinese-run hospital in Zambia, some employees watched as people who recently returned from China showed up with coughs but were not placed in isolation." | "Government is aware that there is a lot of traffic back and forth between Zambia and China, putting the nation at high risk of letting in infected migrants and causing an outbreak." || Social | Living Conditions & Social Fabric | Demographic changes (migration, influx of workers, displacement) -> "Government is aware that there is a lot of traffic back and forth between Zambia and China, putting the nation at high risk of letting in infected migrants and causing an outbreak." | "What is also worrying is that according to the Associated Press article published a fortnight ago, Kitwe has a direct link to Wuhan, the epicentre of Covid-19, through a Copperbelt-based Chinese company that operates at one of the mines."

impact_level3: Worker health and safety risks || Demographic changes (migration, influx of workers, displacement)

title: Gemfields Emerald Auction Gets USD12 Million Despite Virus Hurt | Financial News
impact_evidence: Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation -> "a February emerald auction in Zambia secured USD11.5 million in revenue" | "the result was "dampened" by falling consumer demand due to the coronavirus outbreak." | "a handful of our key auction customers did not travel to Lusaka as a result of the increased risk associated with COVD-19"

title: Zambia : Kalumbila Minerals Ltd awards a 6.5 percent salary increment across the board for 2020 to its employees
